title: Automate Ticket Routing
aiRationale: High-value ITSM workflows rely on ServiceNow ticket routing. Automating assignment by category can reduce triage time by 40%. Moderate effort is required to test and validate workflows.

evidenceItems.label: Ev2. Avg triage time is 12 hours
Ev4. Only 5,763 of 12,945 ServiceNow tickets are categorized.

override.rationaleOverride: Routing ServiceNow support tickets based on category would significantly reduce incident resolution time. Automate assignment to ensure tickets reach the right teams promptly. Moderate development effort is required, primarily for testing and validation.

title: Orchestrate Onboarding Tasks
aiRationale: Onboarding tasks are fragmented across multiple systems. Orchestration can reduce time-to-productivity for new hires.

evidenceItems.label: Ev1. 42 onboarding tickets created per month
Ev3. Avg onboarding completion is 14 days

title: Recommend ServiceNow KB Articles
aiRationale: Agents spend time searching for KB articles. Auto-suggesting relevant articles at ticket creation can reduce resolution time significantly.

evidenceItems.label: Ev2. 68% of tickets have a matching KB article

title: Sync Managed Assets to CMDB
aiRationale: CMDB data is outdated and causes incorrect routing. Syncing managed assets automatically improves downstream accuracy.

evidenceItems.label: Ev3. 34% of CMDB records are stale
Ev5. Asset sync runs manually once a week

title: Generate Pilot Summary Reports
aiRationale: Pilot summaries are written manually from ticket data. An agent can auto-generate draft reports saving analyst time.

evidenceItems.label: Ev4. Reports take avg 3 hours to produce manually

title: Optimize SAP Approvals Workflow
aiRationale: SAP approval workflows involve many manual steps. Automating routing and escalation can reduce cycle time but requires deep SAP integration.

evidenceItems.label: Ev3. Avg approval cycle is 5.2 days
Ev1. 18% of approvals are escalated manually

title: Recommend Jira Ticket Priorities
aiRationale: Jira tickets are inconsistently prioritized. An ML model can suggest priorities based on historical patterns.

evidenceItems.label: Ev2. 55% of tickets lack a priority label
Ev4. High-priority bugs avg 2x resolution time

override.rationaleOverride: Priority recommendations based on Jira patterns will reduce triage overhead. Implement as suggestion-only in first phase.

title: Propose Custom Alerts
aiRationale: Monitoring alerts are generic and cause alert fatigue. Custom alerting rules based on service ownership can improve response rates.

evidenceItems.label: Ev5. 72% of alerts are dismissed without action
